input: Evaluate EGFR as a drug target for non-small cell lung cancer. Provide full target assessment including disease association, druggability, existing compounds, and safety profile.

expected_details.disease_association: strong (genetic evidence: activating mutations, clinical precedent: multiple approved TKIs)
expected_details.druggability: high (small molecule tractable, multiple generations of inhibitors)

input: Evaluate PCSK9 as a drug target for hyperlipidemia and atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.

expected_details.disease_association: strong (Mendelian genetics: gain-of-function = hypercholesterolemia, loss-of-function = low LDL + cardioprotection)
expected_details.druggability: validated — monoclonal antibodies and siRNA approved

input: Evaluate KRAS G12D as a drug target for pancreatic cancer. Note the historical 'undruggable' status and recent progress.

expected_details.disease_association: strong (KRAS G12D is the most common KRAS mutation in PDAC, ~40%)
expected_details.druggability: emerging — historically undruggable; G12C solved (sotorasib/adagrasib); G12D inhibitors in clinical development
expected_details.challenge: G12D lacks the cysteine residue used by G12C covalent inhibitors; requires non-covalent approach

input: Evaluate CD20 as a drug target for B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
Evaluate GPBAR1 (TGR5, bile acid receptor) as a drug target for MASH/NASH. This is a less validated target with emerging data.

expected_details.disease_association: moderate (preclinical evidence strong; limited clinical validation)
expected_details.druggability: moderate (GPCR class is tractable; no approved drugs for this target)

input: Evaluate BCL-2 as a drug target for chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL).

expected_details.disease_association: strong (BCL-2 overexpression is a hallmark of CLL via t(14;18) and other mechanisms)

input: Evaluate tau protein (MAPT) as a drug target for Alzheimer's disease. This is a high-value but historically difficult target.

expected_details.disease_association: strong (tau tangles correlate with cognitive decline better than amyloid; genetic evidence from MAPT mutations in FTD)
expected_details.druggability: difficult — no approved tau-targeting therapies; multiple clinical failures
expected_details.challenge: intracellular target; blood-brain barrier; tau exists in multiple conformations

input: Evaluate Claudin 18.2 (CLDN18.2) as a drug target for gastric cancer.

expected_details.disease_association: strong (expressed in ~60-80% of gastric cancers; limited normal tissue expression beyond gastric mucosa)

input: Evaluate PD-1 (PDCD1) as a drug target across solid tumors. Provide a broad target assessment.

expected_details.disease_association: broad (pan-tumor relevance; PD-1/PD-L1 axis exploited by many cancers for immune evasion)
expected_details.druggability: fully validated — blockbuster class with multiple approved agents
expected_details.market_size: largest oncology drug class by revenue

input: Evaluate GRK2 (G-protein coupled receptor kinase 2) as a drug target for heart failure. This is a preclinical-stage target.

expected_details.disease_association: moderate (GRK2 upregulated in failing hearts; desensitizes beta-adrenergic receptors; preclinical genetic evidence)
expected_details.druggability: early (kinase class is tractable; paroxetine identified as weak inhibitor; selective inhibitors in development)
expected_details.genetic_evidence: cardiac-specific GRK2 knockout improves function in mouse HF models
expected_details.challenge: selectivity within GRK family; cardiac-specific delivery
